title: Craftable Gunpowder
description: Tiny (Neo-)Forge-Mod makes gunpowder craftable using a simple recipe in any order.
body:
This tiny (Neo-)Forge mod makes gunpowder craftable using a simple recipe of **glowstone dust, redstone dust, flint and (char)coal**. The items can be **arranged in any order** in a crafting table as well as in the small crafting window using your inventory.

![Crafting recipe consisting of flint, (char-)coal, glowstone dust and redstone dust.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25718aca77e511e98c55c3fb6d077f77541ec523.gif)


![Meme showing user using the crafting recipe with a pleased face.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2056b64a6c754f80cd252179772e7a1589782970.png)

Requires (Neo-)Forge.
